chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1167 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of CMA No.7496/2023 (151 CPC) 07.03.2024 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The listed application has served its purpose as the petitioner has been permitted to join his duty. His Advocate, however, has submitted that amount of arrears in respect of salaries of the petitioner is outstanding. Let an application in this regard be filed before the competent authority, which shall decide it expeditiously in accordance with law. The listed application, in above terms, stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
